case_title: STRATA APARTMENT HOLDINGS, LLC VS. BRIANNA DEWITT ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; AND FORMS UD101 & UD120. (TRANSACTION ID # 200036281), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRATA APARTMENT HOLDINGS, LLC SERVED AUG-02-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEWITT, BRIANNA
